name: Foeniculum Vulgare | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: This is indicated in indigestion, flatulence oliguria.
pharmacology: Foeniculum Vulgaren is an effective herbal preparation containing Foeniculum vulgare. It acts as a carminative, laxative, appetizer, digestive, diuretic, antispasmodic. It improves digestion and very useful as liver detoxifying agent. Foeniculum Vulgare is useful in liver, stomach and intestine (bowel) disorders and normalizes their function relieves gas.
dosage_&amp;_administration: 4-6 teaspoonfuls (20-30 ml) 2 times daily or as prescribed by the registered physician.
side_effects: No significant side effect has been observed in therapeutic dosage.
storage_conditions: Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool and dry place away from light.
